name: OFFICIALv2
tooltip: OFFICIAL — Routine Queensland Government information with no or negligible business impact if compromised (BIL:0–1). Default classification for general business content. No special handling required beyond standard agency practices.

name: SENSITIVEv2
tooltip: SENSITIVE — Information that could cause limited to moderate damage to an individual, organisation, or Queensland Government operations if compromised (BIL:2). Select a Dissemination Limiting Marker (DLM) below to specify the type of sensitive information.

name: SENSITIVE-Defaultv2
tooltip: SENSITIVE — Information that could cause limited to moderate damage if compromised (BIL:2). Use this label when no specific Dissemination Limiting Marker applies but content requires protection above OFFICIAL.

name: SENSITIVE-Personal-Privacyv2
tooltip: SENSITIVE Personal-Privacy — Personal information protected under the Information Privacy Act 2009 (Qld) and the Australian Privacy Principles. Includes names combined with identifiers such as tax file numbers, health records, driver licence details, and other personal data that could cause harm if disclosed.

name: SENSITIVE-Personal-Privacyv2
tooltip: SENSITIVE Personal-Privacy — Personal information protected under the Information Privacy Act 2009 (Qld) and the Australian Privacy Principles. Includes names combined with identifiers such as tax file numbers, health records, driver licence details, and other personal data that could cause harm if disclosed.

name: SENSITIVE-Financialv2
tooltip: SENSITIVE Financial — Financial information including bank account details, credit card numbers, BSB numbers, and financial records that could enable fraud or cause financial loss if disclosed. Covers information subject to financial regulatory obligations.

name: SENSITIVE-Legalv2
tooltip: SENSITIVE Legal — Information subject to legal professional privilege, litigation hold, or statutory secrecy provisions. Includes legal advice, contracts, loan agreements, mortgage documents, and court-related material requiring restricted handling.

name: SENSITIVE-Law-Enforcementv2
tooltip: SENSITIVE Law-Enforcement — Information related to Queensland law enforcement operations, investigations, or compliance activities. Disclosure could prejudice investigations, endanger individuals, or compromise enforcement actions.

name: SENSITIVE-Governmentv2
tooltip: SENSITIVE Government — Queensland Cabinet and executive government information, including Cabinet-in-Confidence material, budget deliberations, and inter-governmental correspondence. Restricted distribution within authorised government personnel only.

name: SENSITIVE-InfoTechv2
tooltip: SENSITIVE InfoTech — Information technology assets, configurations, source code, network documentation, IT operational plans, and technical intellectual property. Disclosure could enable targeted attacks, reveal system architecture, or compromise IT operations. Requires controlled distribution among authorised IT personnel.

name: PROTECTEDv2
tooltip: PROTECTED — Information that could cause significant damage to an individual, organisation, or Queensland Government if compromised (BIL:3). Highest QGISCF classification. Encryption may be required. Select a caveat below.

name: PROTECTED-Defaultv2
tooltip: PROTECTED — Information that could cause significant damage if compromised (BIL:3). Includes credentials, secrets, security assessments, critical infrastructure data, and highly sensitive personal records. Use this label when no specific caveat applies.

name: PROTECTED-Personal-Privacyv2
tooltip: PROTECTED Personal-Privacy — High-risk personal information where disclosure could cause significant harm. Includes biometric data, health records requiring elevated protection, and personal data subject to mandatory breach notification under the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth).

name: PROTECTED-Financialv2
tooltip: PROTECTED Financial — High-risk financial information where disclosure could cause significant financial damage. Includes large-scale transaction records, government budget deliberations, and financial data subject to critical regulatory obligations.

name: PROTECTED-Legalv2
tooltip: PROTECTED Legal — High-risk legal professional privilege content where disclosure could cause significant damage to legal proceedings or government legal position. Includes sensitive litigation material and privileged legal advice on critical matters.

name: PROTECTED-Law-Enforcementv2
tooltip: PROTECTED Law-Enforcement — High-risk law enforcement information where disclosure could cause significant harm to operations, endanger lives, or severely compromise ongoing investigations. Includes covert operations material and witness protection information.

name: PROTECTED-Governmentv2
tooltip: PROTECTED Government — Highest classification for Queensland Cabinet and executive government information. Disclosure could cause significant damage to government operations, intergovernmental relations, or public safety. Restricted to authorised personnel with a need-to-know.

name: PROTECTED-InfoTechv2
tooltip: PROTECTED InfoTech — High-risk information technology assets where disclosure could cause significant damage. Includes authentication credentials, API keys, secrets, connection strings, security assessment outputs (penetration tests, vulnerability reports), and critical infrastructure documentation (SCADA, ICS, OT systems). Exposure enables direct system compromise, unauthorized access, or targeted infrastructure attacks.
